LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF VLADIMIR TIMIN'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT FILED A STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE ITS PROPOSED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Lfirst Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF VLADIMIR TIMIN'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is granted. Defendant filed a statement of non-opposition. Plaintiff may file its proposed First Amended Complaint within 10 days of entry of this order. The Court modified and signed the ORDER that was submitted with the moving papers. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
